2606.06294.title: Towards One-to-Many Temporal Grounding
2606.06294.paper_summary: Temporal Grounding (TG) aims to localize video segments corresponding to a textual query. Prior research predominantly focuses on single-segment retrieval. Real-world scenarios, however, often require localizing multiple disjoint segments for a single query -- a setting we term One-to-Many Temporal Grounding (OMTG). Previous state-of-the-art MLLMs, optimized for one-to-one settings, struggle in this context, often yielding near-zero scores due to a lack of event cardinality perception. To bridge this gap, we present a systematic solution with three key contributions. First, we establish the first comprehensive OMTG benchmark, introducing Count Accuracy (C-Acc) and Effective Temporal F1 (EtF1) as evaluation metrics. Second, we curate a high-quality OMTG dataset comprising 56k samples through a sophisticated construction pipeline. Third, we develop novel temporal and caption reward functions specifically designed for OMTG. In particular, the caption reward leverages Chain-of-Thought reasoning over dense video captions to explicitly guide policy optimization toward both preciseness and completeness. Extensive experiments show our model achieves a new state-of-the-art EtF1 of 43.65\% on OMTG Bench, outperforming Gemini 2.5 Pro and Seed-1.8 by 15.85\% and 15.61\%, respectively.
2606.06294.paper_summary_zh: 時間基礎（TG）旨在定位與文本查詢相對應的視頻片段。<lb/>先前的研究主要集中在單一片段檢索上。<lb/>然而，現實世界的場景通常需要為單一查詢定位多個不相交的片段——我們稱之為一對多時間基礎（OMTG）。<lb/>之前的最先進的多語言大型模型（MLLMs）在一對一的設置中進行優化，但在這種情境下卻表現不佳，經常因缺乏事件基數感知而導致接近零的分數。<lb/>為了彌補這一差距，我們提出了一個系統化的解決方案，並有三個主要貢獻。<lb/>首先，我們建立了第一個全面的OMTG基準，並引入計數準確度（C-Acc）和有效時間F1（EtF1）作為評估指標。<lb/>其次，我們通過一個複雜的構建流程策劃了一個高質量的OMTG數據集，包含56,000個樣本。<lb/>第三，我們開發了專門為OMTG設計的新型時間和標題獎勵函數。<lb/>特別是，標題獎勵利用鏈式思維推理來對密集視頻標題進行明確的指導，從而促進政策優化朝向精確性和完整性。<lb/>大量實驗顯示，我們的模型在OMTG基準上達到了新的最先進的EtF1 43.65\%，分別超越了Gemini 2.5 Pro和Seed-1.8 15.85\%和15.61\%。
2606.06294.author: Qi Xu et.al.
2606.06294.authors: Qi Xu, Yue Tan, Shihao Chen, Jiahao Meng, Anna Wang, Shunping Ji, Hao Fei, Jason Li
